_comment: Host profile (ADR-0014, #109) — per-MACHINE config, NOT committed with real values. Copy this to ~/.teahouse/host-profile.json and fill in this box's facts. It holds machine facts (LiteLLM URL, api-key env-var name, rootless-Docker flag), not repo facts (those live in repo-profile.json). Keeping a machine's LiteLLM URL here — never in the repo or a built image — means changing the host never requires an image rebuild.
